name: ForensicNet: Lightweight Attention-Enhanced MobileNetV2 for Automated Face Identification
summary: arXiv:2607.16273v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In forensic environments, automated identification of perpetrators is difficult due to pose changes, changes in light, occlusion, and lack of label...
description: arXiv:2607.16273v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In forensic environments, automated identification of perpetrators is difficult due to pose changes, changes in light, occlusion, and lack of labeled data. This paper presents ForensicNet, a lightweight deep learning framework for forensic face recognition that enhances attention. The suggested model combines the MobileNetV2 backbone with Convol...
author: Savitha N J, Lata B T
